mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD
AND ls.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND w.WAREHOUSE_CD = #{warehouseCd} AND z.ZONE_ID = #{zoneId} AND l.LOCATION_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationCd}, '%') AND (ls.ITEM_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%') OR i.ITEM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%')) AND ls.LOT_NO LIKE CONCAT('%', #{lotNo}, '%') AND ls.STOCK_QTY > 0

SELECT ls.LOC_STOCK_ID, ls.PLANT_CD, ls.LOCATION_ID, ls.ITEM_CD, ls.LOT_NO, ls.STOCK_QTY, ls.RESERVED_QTY, ls.AVAILABLE_QTY, ls.REG_USER_ID, ls.REG_DTM, ls.UPD_USER_ID, ls.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, z.ZONE_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.ITEM_SPEC, i.UNIT FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON ls.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD WHERE ls.LOC_STOCK_ID = #{locStockId}

SELECT ls.LOC_STOCK_ID, ls.PLANT_CD, ls.LOCATION_ID, ls.ITEM_CD, ls.LOT_NO, ls.STOCK_QTY, ls.RESERVED_QTY, ls.AVAILABLE_QTY, ls.REG_USER_ID, ls.REG_DTM, ls.UPD_USER_ID, ls.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, z.ZONE_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.ITEM_SPEC, i.UNIT FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON ls.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD WHERE ls.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND ls.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND ls.ITEM_CD = #{itemCd} AND ls.LOT_NO = COALESCE(#{lotNo}, '') FOR UPDATE

SELECT ls.LOC_STOCK_ID, ls.PLANT_CD, ls.LOCATION_ID, ls.ITEM_CD, ls.LOT_NO, ls.STOCK_QTY, ls.RESERVED_QTY, ls.AVAILABLE_QTY, ls.REG_USER_ID, ls.REG_DTM, ls.UPD_USER_ID, ls.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, z.ZONE_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, i.ITEM_NM, i.ITEM_SPEC, i.UNIT FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON ls.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD WHERE ls.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND ls.ITEM_CD = #{itemCd} AND ls.AVAILABLE_QTY >= #{requestQty} AND l.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ls.AVAILABLE_QTY DESC, ls.REG_DTM, l.LOCATION_CD
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_LOCATION_STOCK SET STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + #{adjustQty}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE LOC_STOCK_ID = #{locStockId}

UPDATE MCS_LOCATION l LEFT JOIN ( SELECT LOCATION_ID, COALESCE(SUM(STOCK_QTY), 0) AS CURRENT_USAGE FROM MCS_LOCATION_STOCK WHERE LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} GROUP BY LOCATION_ID ) s ON l.LOCATION_ID = s.LOCATION_ID SET l.CURRENT_USAGE = COALESCE(s.CURRENT_USAGE, 0), l.LOCATION_STATUS = CASE WHEN COALESCE(s.CURRENT_USAGE, 0) <= 0 THEN 'EMPTY' WHEN COALESCE(s.CURRENT_USAGE, 0) >= l.MAX_CAPACITY THEN 'FULL' ELSE 'PARTIAL' END, l.UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, l.UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE l.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCS_LOC_TRANS_HIS h INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls ON h.LOC_STOCK_ID = ls.LOC_STOCK_ID INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD
AND h.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND h.REG_DTM >= CONCAT(#{fromDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND h.REG_DTM <= CONCAT(#{toDate}, ' 23:59:59') AND h.TRANS_TYPE = #{transType} AND (ls.ITEM_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%') OR i.ITEM_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCd}, '%')) AND l.LOCATION_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{locationCd}, '%')

SELECT h.LOC_TRANS_ID, h.PLANT_CD, h.LOC_STOCK_ID, h.TRANS_TYPE, h.TRANS_QTY, h.BEFORE_QTY, h.AFTER_QTY, h.REF_TYPE, h.REF_NO, h.REF_ID, h.TRANS_RMK, h.REG_USER_ID, h.REG_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, c.COM_NM AS TRANS_TYPE_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, z.ZONE_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, ls.ITEM_CD, i.ITEM_NM, ls.LOT_NO FROM MCS_LOC_TRANS_HIS h INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON h.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION_STOCK ls ON h.LOC_STOCK_ID = ls.LOC_STOCK_ID INNER JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON ls.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ZONE z ON l.ZONE_ID = z.ZONE_ID INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD INNER JOIN MST_ITEM i ON ls.ITEM_CD = i.ITEM_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_INV_TX_TYPE' AND h.TRANS_TYPE = c.COM_CD WHERE h.REF_TYPE = #{refType} AND ( h.REF_NO = #{refNo} OR h.REF_ID = #{refId} ) ORDER BY h.LOC_TRANS_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_LOC_TRANS_HIS ( PLANT_CD, LOC_STOCK_ID, TRANS_TYPE, TRANS_QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_TYPE, REF_NO, REF_ID, TRANS_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{plantCd}, #{locStockId}, #{transType}, #{transQty}, #{beforeQty}, #{afterQty}, #{refType}, #{refNo}, #{refId}, #{transRmk}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE INV_STOCK SET STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + #{adjustQty}, LAST_OUT_DT = CASE WHEN #{adjustQty} < 0 THEN CURDATE() ELSE LAST_OUT_DT END, LAST_IN_DT = CASE WHEN #{adjustQty} > 0 THEN CURDATE() ELSE LAST_IN_DT END, STOCK_AMT = (STOCK_QTY + #{adjustQty}) * COALESCE(UNIT_COST, 0), UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND WAREHOUSE_CD = #{warehouseCd} AND LOCATION_CD = '' AND ITEM_CD = #{itemCd} AND LOT_NO = COALESCE(#{lotNo}, '') AND STOCK_QTY + #{adjustQty} >= 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO INV_STOCK ( PLANT_CD, WAREHOUSE_CD, LOCATION_CD, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, STOCK_QTY, RESERVED_QTY, UNIT, STOCK_STATUS, LAST_IN_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) SELECT #{plantCd}, #{warehouseCd}, '', #{itemCd}, COALESCE(#{lotNo}, ''), #{adjustQty}, 0, i.UNIT, '정상', CURDATE(), #{regUserId}, NOW() FROM MST_ITEM i WHERE i.ITEM_CD = #{itemCd} ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE STOCK_QTY = STOCK_QTY + VALUES(STOCK_QTY), LAST_IN_DT = CURDATE(), STOCK_AMT = (STOCK_QTY + VALUES(STOCK_QTY)) * COALESCE(UNIT_COST, 0), UPD_USER_ID = #{regUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW()

INSERT INTO INV_TRANS_HIS ( PLANT_CD, TRANS_NO, TRANS_DT, TRANS_TYPE, TRANS_REASON, ITEM_CD, LOT_NO, TRANS_QTY, UNIT, FROM_WAREHOUSE_CD, TO_WAREHOUSE_CD, FROM_LOCATION_CD, TO_LOCATION_CD, REF_TYPE, REF_NO, REF_ID, TRANS_USER_ID, TRANS_RMK, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) SELECT #{plantCd}, #{transNo}, CURDATE(), '이동', 'MCS이동', #{itemCd}, COALESCE(#{lotNo}, ''), #{transQty}, i.UNIT, #{fromWarehouseCd}, #{toWarehouseCd}, #{fromLocationCd}, #{toLocationCd}, 'TF', #{refNo}, #{refId}, #{transUserId}, 'MCS 로케이션 이동 완료', #{regUserId}, NOW() FROM MST_ITEM i WHERE i.ITEM_CD = #{itemCd}
